title: Fix production site missing styles on autocashback.dev
description: Investigate why https://www.autocashback.dev/ loads without page styles in production. Check rendered HTML, CSS asset URLs, proxy/static serving, and recent frontend build changes. Implement and verify the fix.
close_reason: Fixed standalone startup asset mapping so .next/static and public are available under the standalone app root, restoring CSS asset responses in production.

title: Continue remaining control-surface optimization after queue
description: Continue optimizing remaining autocashback control surfaces after queue. Audit components and embedded admin panels that still use older layout patterns, then implement the next highest-value control-console refinement while preserving existing behavior and product semantics.
close_reason: Completed admin operations monitor and admin users console refinement, plus added derived-state coverage tests.

title: Continue post-accounts optimization for remaining control surfaces
description: Continue optimizing the remaining autocashback control surfaces after accounts, offers, and click-farm. Identify the next highest-value module to convert into the unified control-console pattern, reusing autobb implementation approaches where semantics overlap and preserving autocashback's product framing and green UI language.
notes: Optimized the queue module into a unified control console. Added overview metrics, search/sort/filter support for queue tasks, scheduler health/risk surfacing, a dedicated configuration panel, and preserved existing manual dispatch/config save behaviors with derived-state helpers and tests.
close_reason: Completed the next control-surface optimization slice by rebuilding queue into a unified control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Continue UI parity optimization after click-farm
description: Continue improving remaining autocashback modules after offers and click-farm. Audit the remaining in-app pages, identify the next highest-confidence module for autobb-style control-console alignment, and implement the next optimization slice while preserving autocashback semantics and green design language.
notes: Optimized the accounts module into a control-console layout tailored to autocashback. Added overview metrics, linked-offer visibility, filter/sort controls, operational reminders, and a focused account editor while preserving existing APIs and green UI language.
close_reason: Completed the next optimization slice by rebuilding accounts into a control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Continue parity optimization for remaining overlapping UI modules
description: Continue aligning remaining autocashback modules with autobb implementation patterns where semantics overlap, while preserving autocashback product positioning and green visual system. Audit remaining app pages and optimize the next highest-confidence module.
notes: Optimized the click-farm module into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics. Added overview metrics, filter/sort controls, task health reminders, and a focused task creation/edit entry while reusing the existing click-farm dialog and APIs.
close_reason: Completed the next parity slice by rebuilding click-farm into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Align overlapping autocashback features with autobb implementations
description: User requested a project-wide rule: whenever autocashback has functionality similar to autobb, reuse autobb's implementation approach for frontend UI/UX (while preserving autocashback's green visual direction) and backend APIs/business logic. Audit overlapping features, identify parity gaps, and migrate the highest-confidence overlapping modules.
notes: Dashboard, link-swap, settings, google-ads, and now offers all use autobb-style control-console structures adapted to autocashback semantics. Offers now has overview metrics, guided filters, action-focused reminders, and a management-console editor without importing unrelated autobb business concepts.
close_reason: Completed the remaining major parity slice by rebuilding offers into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Align admin users page with autobb implementation
description: Compare /admin/users in this project with the corresponding user management implementation in the local autobb project, then bring UI/UX and functional behavior back in line where intended.
close_reason: Aligned /admin/users with autobb-style management flows by adding search, sorting, pagination, edit/delete, reset password, and login history APIs plus a redesigned management console UI.

title: Remove internal implementation notes from user-facing copy
description: Audit user-facing copy across the system and remove internal/developer-facing wording such as implementation notes, cross-project references, and operator guidance that should not be shown to end users. Replace with concise product copy and verify affected routes/components.
close_reason: Removed internal implementation notes and cross-project references from user-facing copy across dashboard, settings, security, monitoring, queue, and seeded platform notes.

title: Fix standalone instrumentation hook runtime error
description: Production standalone startup logs show repeated 'Failed to prepare server ... instrumentation hook: require is not defined'. Trace the instrumentation hook code path in apps/web, fix the runtime incompatibility, and verify startup behavior.
close_reason: Reduced web instrumentation hook to zero-dependency logging so standalone startup no longer throws 'require is not defined' while runtime DB init remains handled outside the hook.

title: Fix missing app-shell module breaking Next.js build
description: next build currently fails in apps/web/app/(app)/layout.tsx because '@/components/app-shell' cannot be resolved. This blocks full standalone runtime verification for the web startup warning fix.
close_reason: Verified current main no longer reproduces the app-shell build failure: next build passes and standalone startup works with instrumentation enabled.

title: Fix scheduler startup Postgres parameter typing failure
description: Scheduler crashes on startup with PostgresError 42P18: could not determine data type of parameter . Trace the startup query, fix SQL parameter typing, and verify scheduler can boot cleanly.
close_reason: Fixed getSettings Postgres query construction so scheduler queue config bootstrap no longer hits 42P18 on startup.

title: Introduce autobb-style migrations and startup DB init

Update bootstrap logic so it can connect to an administrative database, create the target database if missing, then apply schema/admin initialization. Verify with tests.
close_reason: Bootstrap now creates a missing Postgres database before schema/admin initialization and includes regression coverage.

title: 修正后台UI优化方案的落地前提与Phase 0清单

notes: 本轮复核补充了 5 类需要纳入文档修正的前提：1) Settings 改 Tabs 需保留 #proxy-settings / #google-ads-settings 等现有 hash 深链；2) 侧边栏用户区若展示最后登录/订阅信息，需要扩展 CurrentUser 与相关 API；3) Phase 0 amber 清理命令需覆盖 /35 /60 /80 等变体，且当前计数与实际代码不一致；4) 验收命令应改为 npm workspaces 体系，并补上 type-check/test；5) Tooltip/Stepper/@testing-library/react 都不是现成能力，需要在依赖与测试基建里显式决策。

title: Add advanced admin user controls to match autobb parity
description: Follow up on /admin/users parity after the core management console alignment. Remaining gaps versus autobb require additional data model/API support: account enable/disable state, forced unlock, richer session/security alerts, and package/subscription metadata.
notes:
Extended admin login history into a mixed timeline: merged successful sessions with failed-login and lockout audit events, stored failure reasons on login_failed audit entries, and updated the /admin/users login-history modal to show success, failure, lockout, expiry, and revocation in one view. Package/subscription metadata is still the only major parity area left, and remains optional depending on product direction.
Added status-first triage on /admin/users: introduced all/risk/locked/disabled/active-session quick filters, enabled status sorting in listAdminUsers, and highlighted risk rows so operators can move directly from overview into the right remediation queue. Covered with route and sqlite tests for filtered pagination behavior.
Pushed /admin/users one step further toward overview-action-risk: overview cards now double as triage shortcuts, disabled counts can jump straight into the disabled queue, and the page now surfaces an action queue with the highest-priority users on the current page (locked, disabled, repeated failures, multi-session) plus one-click remediation.

title: 优化登录后页面布局并对齐 autobb 交互
description: 参考 autobb 项目的登录后页面布局设计，优化当前项目登录后的导航、页头和 dashboard 首屏布局，保持当前项目绿色风格；对与 autobb 类似的功能尽量统一 UI/UX 设计语言。
close_reason: 对齐 autobb 的登录后壳层与 dashboard 层级，保留绿色主题并统一同类功能入口样式

title: Fix runtime startup warnings in container
description: Eliminate the startup warnings seen after the scheduler fix: Next.js standalone should not be started via next start, and the punycode deprecation source should be traced and resolved if feasible.
close_reason: Updated web startup to use standalone entry resolution and lazy-loaded google-ads-api so startup no longer eagerly pulls the punycode warning path; full web runtime verification is blocked by separately tracked build issue.

title: 调整 dashboard 左上区与个人中心位置

close_reason: 移除左上品牌卡并将个人中心改为侧边栏顶部卡片，右上用户条已去除

title: Review remaining reusable autobb implementations

title: Review docs and implementation alignment

close_reason: Updated docs/GoogleAds-ClickFarm-实施记录.md in the local ignored docs directory so the /settings vs /google-ads responsibilities match the shipped code and confirmed acceptance criteria.

title: Assess autobb scheduler and page reuse scope
description: Compare autobb scheduling system and related task pages with autocashback, and determine what should be reused versus what should remain simplified.

title: Review remaining autobb logic reuse gaps
close_reason: Reviewed remaining autobb logic reuse gaps and identified next migration priorities for OAuth flow, Google Ads status handling, and link swap lifecycle

title: Assess whether autocashback reused autobb implementations or reimplemented similar features
description: Compare autocashback against /Users/jason/Documents/Kiro/autobb for Google Ads settings/page, link swap modes, and Offer action features. Determine whether code was directly reused/ported versus independently reimplemented. Provide evidence from file structure, component/API naming, and implementation similarity.
close_reason: Completed audit: autocashback references autobb feature design but does not directly reuse autobb code/modules; implementations are largely rewritten and simplified within autocashback.

title: Audit implementation parity with autobb for Google Ads, link swapping, and offer actions
description: Review autocashback against the requested requirements by comparing with /Users/jason/Documents/Kiro/autobb. Verify: 1) Google Ads API settings/save on /settings and new /google-ads page, 2) link swapping supports Google Ads API mode in addition to script mode, 3) Offer management action column fully supports backfill click task, swap link task, and delete offer, and excludes publish ad / blacklist delivery. Report gaps with file references.
close_reason: Completed audit: verified Google Ads settings/save + /google-ads page, link swap script/API modes, and Offer action column includes click-farm, link-swap, delete while omitting publish/blacklist.
